title: EC.dev
description: This portfolio website is a single-page application that showcases my resume, work, and background.
l_description: This single-page portfolio website serves as a digital resume, showcasing my work and background. Built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS, it allowed me to enhance my web development skills, experiment with modern technologies, and improve my design aesthetics.
techs: HTML, CSS, TS, Tailwind, React, Next.js

title: Urban Luxe
description: This is a FICTIONAL mock e-commerce apparel web project designed to enhance and refine my front-end development skills.
l_description: This is a FICTIONAL mock e-commerce apparel web project designed to enhance and refine my front-end development skills. The project's goal was to create a fully functional and aesthetically pleasing online store from scratch, leveraging frameworks like Next.js and React with as minimal libraries as possible. For more information, check out the Github repo or live demo below.
